layman_headline: Fearful market with geopolitical headwinds — no clean swing trade setups right now.
layman_explanation: Bitcoin just slipped below $65K as tensions between Iran and oil markets are spooking investors. The overall crypto market is in 'Fear' mode at 31/100, and Bitcoin dominance at 56.7% means money is flowing out of altcoins and into Bitcoin for safety. The swing trade candidates today are either wildly overbought (BCAP up 363%), in freefall (GROK, BONK), or lacking solid technical structure. Ethereum has the best chart pattern — Three White Soldiers — but the geopolitical backdrop and weak RSI make it premature to enter.
layman_action: Stay patient and keep cash ready. Wait for the Iran-oil situation to stabilize or for ETH to pull back to the $1,850 support zone before considering an entry. No rush — fear markets reward patience.
expert_reasoning: Among the candidates, ETH stands out with a slightly bullish chart bias (+0.30), a Three White Soldiers pattern suggesting sustained buying pressure, and price sitting just above SMA20. However, RSI at 44 is neutral (not oversold enough for a high-conviction bounce trade), and the macro backdrop is deteriorating — CoinTelegraph reports Bitcoin sliding below $65K on Iran conflict fears driving $100 oil and surging bond yields. BTC dominance at 56.7% signals capital rotation away from alts. The Fear & Greed index at 31 is improving from 28.3 weekly average, which is historically a contrarian buy zone, but we need to see fear stabilize or reverse before committing capital. I'd want ETH to retest $1,850 support for a cleaner entry with a tighter stop.
risk_factors: Iran conflict escalation could drive further risk-off selling across all crypto assets
BTC dominance at 56.7% and rising means altcoins including ETH face continued outflows
ETH is still 61.9% below ATH in a structural downtrend — the Three White Soldiers pattern needs confirmation above $2,000 resistance
watch_list: Iran-oil situation developments — any de-escalation could trigger a broad crypto relief rally
ETH price action at $1,900 support — a clean hold here with rising volume would strengthen the buy case
Fear & Greed index trajectory — if it continues improving toward 35-40, that confirms sentiment bottoming
market_context: Crypto markets are under pressure from geopolitical risk as Iran tensions push oil toward $100 and bond yields surge, creating a risk-off environment. BTC at $65K with 56.7% dominance signals capital consolidation into the safety of Bitcoin while alts bleed.
context_banner: Geopolitical headwinds and high BTC dominance make this a patience-over-action cycle — the best trade is waiting for a cleaner entry.

key_signals.description: Bitcoin sliding below $65K driven by Iran conflict fueling $100 oil and bond-yield surge — this macro headwind overrides individual coin technicals.
Fear & Greed at 31 (Fear) but improving from 28.3 weekly average — approaching contrarian buy territory but not quite there yet.
BONK RSI at 29 is the only oversold candidate, but its bearish chart structure (-0.70) and meme coin nature make it too risky without a catalyst.
ETH's Three White Soldiers pattern is the strongest bullish signal among candidates, but needs confirmation above $2,000 resistance.
ETH derivatives reset noted by Blockworks suggests positioning is cleaner, which could support a move higher once macro stabilizes.
